title: The Arcane path of Chemistry
description: Unleash the power of alchemy and technology to break down items into atoms, recombine elements, and create magical artifacts with advanced machines and arcane devices.
body:
![NeoForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c11c8828201f2720ee51e131743afa72621579c.png) ![ModFest 1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23901711847e2f58e0bf750341d4d190e5f57d5a.png)
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**The Arcane path of Chemistry**

Unleash the secrets of matter and magic with **The Arcane path of Chemistry**, a mod that blends science, technology, and sorcery. With powerful machines and devices, players can deconstruct items down to their atomic components, recombine elements, and create rare resources and mysterious items. Master the art of **The Arcane path of Chemistry** by harnessing both scientific prowess and arcane power to achieve mastery over matter itself!![Atoms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2359666c7ab8d216b75fdaa46e0635c97b26db85.png)
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

**Objectives and Goals:**

- Unlock Atom-Based Crafting: Gather, decompose, and synthesize atoms for a vast range of crafting options.
- Achieve Alchemical Mastery: Experiment with rare atoms and infusions to unlock secret recipes and mysterious items.
- Innovative Machines: Master high-tech devices with magical elements, blurring the line between alchemy and technology.
- Enhanced Exploration: Seek out rare materials and magical items with enhanced properties, enabling new adventures.

Enter a realm where science and magic intertwine with **The Arcane path of Chemistry** the ultimate mod for players who wish to master the elements, deconstruct matter, and create wonders of alchemical technology.

![In Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/041ad6b81da4f8789123d1e32f6d46aedc079f63_0.webp)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

All block entitys are Data-Driven. That mens that you can make a new recipe by making a Json file
